notes: Section 3521, , , , set forth Congressional findings with respect to regulatory simplification.Pub. L. 96–221, title VIII, § 80294 Stat. 191Mar. 31, 1980
Section 3522, , , , set forth statement of policy respecting regulations issued by Federal financial regulatory agencies.Pub. L. 96–221, title VIII, § 80394 Stat. 191Mar. 31, 1980

Section 3524, , , , related to reporting requirements for each financial regulatory agency.Pub. L. 96–221, title VIII, § 80594 Stat. 192Mar. 31, 1980

Effective Date of Repeal, , , provided that:Pub. L. 96–221, title VIII, § 80694 Stat. 192Mar. 31, 1980“This title [enacting this subchapter] is hereby repealed five years after the date of enactment of this title [].”Mar. 31, 1980
